hero.name: Yuvaraj Dhammure
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.description: 2.7 years of building and crafting high-performance frontend solutions. Specializing in scalable React ecosystems and obsessed with pixel-perfect UI/UX.

about.summary: Frontend Developer with a proven track record of improving application performance by 30% through optimized code and advanced state management. Expert in the MERN stack, converting complex business requirements into responsive, mobile-first user interfaces.

highlights: Led frontend development for Translation and Billing Management portals, supporting 500+ daily active users with React.js and Next.js, delivering scalable web applications.
Programmed interactive dashboards using React.js, Next.js, and RESTful APIs, improving data loading time by 25% through optimized API requests and efficient state management.
Integrated real-time data synchronization using Axios and asynchronous data handling, ensuring 99.9% data accuracy and consistent client workflows.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (Product, Backend, QA, Design) to define technical requirements and sprint roadmaps, achieving a 100% on-time delivery rate for all sprint milestones.
Modernized legacy user interfaces into responsive Single Page Applications (SPAs) using React.js, increasing mobile user engagement by 40% through mobile-first and responsive design principles.
Configured complex state management with Redux Toolkit, enhancing application stability and reducing crash rates by 15% through predictable state handling and optimized data flow.
Partnered with UI/UX designers to create reusable, precise components, resulting in a 20% increase in user session duration and improved interface consistency.
Refactored and modularized the frontend codebase with a component-based architecture, cutting future development effort by approximately 10 hours per week and improving long-term maintainability.

Contributed to the frontend architecture of a high-traffic e-commerce platform, translating Figma designs into clean, semantic HTML5 and CSS3, ensuring responsive layouts and cross-browser compatibility.
Identified and resolved 50+ critical UI bugs during the QA and testing phase, significantly improving application stability, usability, and pre-launch quality.

projects.title: Localization Management System
projects.description: Coded a secure, scalable SaaS portal standardizing services for 200+ clients. Engineered role-based authentication and automated deployment workflows on AWS EC2.
bullets: Engineered role-based authentication and authorization in Next.js, enforcing strict data security.
Hosted on AWS EC2 using proxy servers (PM2) ensuring high availability.
Automated deployment workflows with custom scripts for auto-redeployment.

projects.title: Digital Billing System
projects.description: Developed an Invoices screen allowing users to view, create, and manage invoices with structured JSON data and third-party integrations.
bullets: Built a Plugins management interface to fetch and integrate data across Gmail and AWS S3.
Streamlined third-party data integration using REST APIs and JSON-based workflows.

projects.title: Business Development CRM
projects.description: Spearheaded the creation of a real-time data visualization dashboard improving data accuracy by 7% identified by cross-referencing two data sources.
bullets: Created an interactive real-time data visualization dashboard.
Improved data accuracy and cross-referencing capabilities across multiple sources.
